findings.title: Evidence IDs are exposed
findings.detail: Chunk and query outputs preserve evidence_ids where available.

findings.title: Exam question body text is now retrievable
findings.detail: Exam-question chunks include body text when present, allowing concept terms such as producentensurplus to retrieve relevant exam questions.

findings.title: Source inspection remains required
findings.detail: Retrieved chunks are excerpts and indexes. They must route users to source paths rather than replacing source inspection.

recommended_conditions: Every answer must cite source_path or evidence_id.
Generated report hits must be presented as diagnostics, not source proof.
Pending-review edges must remain visibly pending in answers.
